💚 The family behind every garden
✦ Our story

We are the family behind every garden 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

🌿 Family Owned & Operated
"We do not just make fairy gardens — we pour a little piece of our hearts into every single one."

Welcome to Imagine That! — a family-owned shop where every gnome garden, fairy scene, and succulent arrangement is handcrafted with patience, care, and a whole lot of love.

From our family to yours — every order is custom, one-of-a-kind, and made especially for you or someone you love. We treat every garden like a gift we are giving to a dear friend.

Order Your Garden

Want Something Completely Your Own?

Tell me your vision — a theme, a color, a feeling. I will handcraft something made just for you with patience, care, and love.

Request a Custom Garden
